label: Quantum Register
info: N-qubit register. Auto-sharded above 10 qubits. Each shard tracks only non-zero amplitudes — enables 30+ qubit simulation on a laptop.

label: Ancilla Register
info: Auxiliary scratch qubits for algorithms and error correction. Auto-reset to |0⟩ after use.

label: Classical Register
info: Classical bit register for storing measurement results.

label: X Gate
info: Pauli-X: bit flip |0⟩↔|1⟩. Quantum NOT.

label: Y Gate
info: Pauli-Y: Y|0⟩=i|1⟩. Complex phase — stored as {re,im} (not real-only).

label: Z Gate
info: Pauli-Z: phase flip |1⟩→-|1⟩.

label: S Gate
info: Phase S: |1⟩→i|1⟩. S²=Z.

label: Sdg Gate
info: S-dagger: |1⟩→-i|1⟩.

label: T Gate
info: T gate: |1⟩→e^(iπ/4)|1⟩. T-count determines quantum advantage.

label: Tdg Gate
info: T-dagger: e^(-iπ/4) phase.

label: SX Gate
info: √X gate. IBM native basis gate. SX²=X.

label: Rx(θ)
info: X-rotation: Rx(θ)=cos(θ/2)I-i·sin(θ/2)X. Most common VQE variational gate.

label: Ry(θ)
info: Y-rotation: real-valued matrix — most numerically stable VQE gate. Default gate in HEA.

label: Rz(θ)
info: Z-rotation: diagonal — only modifies phases, no amplitude mixing. Used in QFT.

label: Phase P(θ)
info: Phase gate: |0⟩→|0⟩, |1⟩→e^(iθ)|1⟩. Generalises Z(π), S(π/2), T(π/4).

label: U3(θ,φ,λ)
info: General single-qubit gate — 3 Euler angles. Any single-qubit unitary = U3. IBM native.

label: CNOT (CX)
info: Controlled-NOT: flips target when control=|1⟩. Cross-shard: Schmidt decomposition — no 20-qubit merge.

label: CZ Gate
info: Controlled-Z: phase flip on |11⟩. Symmetric — order irrelevant. Google Sycamore native.

label: CY Gate
info: Controlled-Y. Decomposed as Sdg·CNOT·S.

label: SWAP
info: Exchange two qubits. Implemented as 3 CNOTs: CNOT(a,b);CNOT(b,a);CNOT(a,b).

label: iSWAP
info: iSWAP: SWAP + phase factor i on swapped components. Superconducting native.

label: CP(θ)
info: Controlled-Phase: e^(iθ) to |11⟩ only. QFT subroutine. CP(π)=CZ.

label: CRz(θ)
info: Controlled-Rz: applies Rz(θ) to target when control=|1⟩.

label: RZZ(θ)
info: ZZ Ising coupling: exp(-iθ/2 Z⊗Z). Native QAOA cost layer.

label: Mølmer-Sørensen
info: MS gate: native entangling gate for trapped-ion systems (IonQ, Quantinuum).

label: ECR
info: Echoed Cross-Resonance: IBM superconducting native 2-qubit gate.

label: Toffoli (CCX)
info: Toffoli: flips target when BOTH controls=|1⟩. Cross-shard: 6-CNOT Selinger decomposition.

label: Fredkin (CSWAP)
info: Fredkin: swaps qubits A and B when control=|1⟩.

label: Barrier
info: Optimisation fence — prevents gate reordering. No physical effect.

label: Reset
info: Reset qubit to |0⟩: measure then conditionally flip.

label: Delay
info: Wait for duration — models T1/T2 decoherence or synchronises operations.

label: Custom Unitary
info: Any single-qubit 2×2 unitary. Must satisfy U†U=I.

label: Measure (single)
info: Collapse single qubit to 0 or 1. P(0)=|α|², P(1)=|β|². State collapses — remaining amplitudes renormalised.

label: Measure All
info: shots=1: collapses state. shots>1: samples from probability distribution (non-destructive). Returns {histogram:{bitstring:count}}.

label: Expectation Value
info: ⟨ψ|O|ψ⟩ without collapsing state. Z, X, Y, ZZ, custom Pauli string. Essential for VQE.

label: State Vector
info: Returns [{state,re,im,prob}] sorted by probability. NON-DESTRUCTIVE — does not collapse.

label: Probabilities
info: P(|x⟩)=|⟨x|ψ⟩|² for all basis states. Non-destructive. Returns {bitstring: probability}.

label: QFT
info: Quantum Fourier Transform. O(n²) CP+H gates. Core of Shor's and QPE.

label: VQE
info: Variational Quantum Eigensolver. Minimises ⟨ψ(θ)|H|ψ(θ)⟩. Exact gradients via parameter-shift: ∂f/∂θ=[f(θ+π/2)-f(θ-π/2)]/2.

label: QAOA
info: Quantum Approximate Optimization. p layers alternating cost+mixer. MaxCut, TSP, portfolio.

label: Grover's Search
info: O(√N) oracle queries vs O(N) classical. H^N creates dense state — sparse engine minimal benefit here.

label: Shor's Algorithm
info: Exponential speedup over best classical. Uses QFT + QPE. Factors N in O((log N)³) gates.

label: QPE
info: Quantum Phase Estimation. Estimates eigenphase φ of unitary U|ψ⟩=e^(2πiφ)|ψ⟩.

label: HHL
info: HHL linear systems Ax=b. O(log(N)κ²) vs classical O(Nκ). For ML, PDE, finance.

label: Quantum SVM
info: Quantum kernel SVM: uses circuit overlap to compute kernel matrix.

label: Quantum RNG
info: True random numbers from quantum measurement — genuinely random via quantum uncertainty.

label: Bernstein-Vazirani
info: Finds hidden string s in f(x)=s·x(mod2). Single oracle query vs O(n) classical.

label: Deutsch-Jozsa
info: Constant-or-balanced oracle. Single quantum query vs O(2^(n-1)+1) classical.

label: Quantum Walk
info: Quantum walk on graphs: quadratic speedup over classical random walk.

label: Quantum Teleportation
info: Transfers quantum state via entanglement + 2 classical bits. Does NOT clone (No-Cloning).

label: Amplitude Estimation
info: Quadratic speedup over Monte Carlo. Used in option pricing.

label: ZNE
info: Zero-Noise Extrapolation: scaled noise (1×,2×,3×) extrapolated to zero via Richardson.

label: PEC
info: Probabilistic Error Cancellation: represents ideal op as linear combination of noisy ops.

label: Pauli Twirling
info: Converts coherent noise into Pauli noise by random Pauli insertion.

label: Symmetry Verification
info: Post-select on Hamiltonian symmetries. Detects and discards error-corrupted shots.

label: Clifford Data Regression
info: Trains regression on near-Clifford circuits (classically simulable) to subtract error.

label: Depolarising Noise
info: Applies random Pauli (X,Y,Z) with probability p/3. Most common noise model.

label: Bit-Flip Noise
info: Qubit flips |0⟩↔|1⟩ with probability p.

label: Phase-Flip Noise
info: Applies Z with probability p. Destroys coherence without affecting populations.

label: Amplitude Damping
info: Energy relaxation T1: qubit decays |1⟩→|0⟩. Physically realistic for superconducting qubits.

label: Thermal Relaxation
info: Combined T1+T2 thermal noise. Most physically realistic model for superconducting qubits.

label: Readout Error
info: Readout misclassification: P(1|0) and P(0|1) assignment error.

label: Crosstalk
info: Unwanted coupling between neighbouring qubits during gate operations.

label: Custom Kraus Channel
info: Any physical noise channel: ρ→ΣKᵢρKᵢ†. Kraus operators must satisfy ΣKᵢ†Kᵢ=I.

label: Gaussian Pulse
info: Gaussian microwave pulse for gate implementation. IBM Qiskit Pulse native.

label: DRAG Pulse
info: DRAG: suppresses leakage to |2⟩ in transmon qubits. IBM standard native gate pulse.

label: Square Pulse
info: Constant amplitude pulse for cross-resonance (CR) two-qubit gates.

label: Pulse Schedule
info: Compose multiple pulses into a synchronised schedule with timing control.

label: ECR Pulse
info: Echoed cross-resonance pulse for IBM 2-qubit gates.

label: XEB
info: Cross-Entropy Benchmarking. Compares output distribution to ideal random circuit. Google Sycamore supremacy metric.

label: Randomised Benchmarking
info: Gate fidelity via random Clifford circuits of increasing depth. Fit exponential decay.

label: Process Tomography
info: Full quantum channel characterisation. 4^n input states — exponential cost.

label: State Tomography
info: Reconstructs density matrix ρ from 3^n Pauli measurements.

label: Quantum Volume
info: IBM Quantum Volume: largest square random circuit reliably executable (>2/3 heavy output).

label: Shard Register
info: Explicit sharding control. Usually automatic — use for custom shard size configuration.

label: Amplitude Cache
info: Cache sparse state vector. Critical for VQE — circuit prefix is identical across 1000s of iterations.

label: Bin File Loader
info: Pre-loads gate lookup .bin files (26 MB total) at startup for O(1) Tier-1 gate lookup.

label: Cross-Shard Gate
info: 2-qubit gate spanning shard boundary. Uses Schmidt decomposition — avoids 20-qubit merge (6 GB .bin files).

label: For Loop
info: Iterates over range or collection. Python-style: for i in range(10):  Brace-style: for i in range(10) { }

label: While Loop
info: Repeats body while condition is true. Safety max prevents infinite loops.

label: If / Else
info: Conditional. Supports elif. Quantum feedback: if measure(q[0]) == 1: X(q[1]).

label: Try / Catch
info: Exception handling for DB connections, API calls, hardware failures.

label: Return
info: Return a value from a function.

label: Break
info: Break out of the enclosing for/while loop.

label: Continue
info: Skip to next loop iteration.

label: Function
info: Define reusable function. SimpleSanskrit: def f(x): return x*2  FullSanskrit: fn f(x: float) -> float { x * 2.0 }

label: Function Call
info: Call a function with positional or keyword arguments.

label: Lambda
info: Anonymous function: f = lambda x, y: x + y

label: Async Function
info: Non-blocking async function for network/IO operations.

label: Global Variable
info: Global variable accessible by ALL downstream blocks.

label: Local Variable
info: Variable scoped to the current block.

label: Constant
info: Immutable constant. Cannot change after declaration.

label: Variable Snapshot
info: Dumps ALL variables + quantum states to logs panel. Does NOT affect execution.

label: Environment Variable
info: Read OS environment variable. Falls back to default if not set.

label: Secret / API Key
info: API keys and credentials. Always masked in logs. Never exported to .sq files.

label: String Operations
info: Format, split, join, replace, contains, case, slice, trim, zfill.

label: Regex Operations
info: Match, find, capture, replace using RE2 syntax. Named captures, multiline, case-insensitive.

label: JSON Operations
info: Parse, serialize, JSONPath query, schema validate.

label: XML Operations
info: Parse, XPath query, validate XSD.

label: Hash / HMAC
info: MD5, SHA256/512, Blake3, HMAC-SHA256.

label: Format String
info: f-string: f"Energy: {energy:.6f} Ha". Specs: .Nf, .Ne, d, g, x.

label: Base64
info: Base64 encode/decode. Standard, URL-safe, MIME.

label: Math Operations
info: Full math.h: trig, log, power, rounding, min/max, clamp.

label: Matrix Operations
info: Multiply, inverse, transpose, eigenvalues, SVD, QR, LU, trace, norm.

label: FFT / IFFT
info: Classical Fast Fourier Transform. For quantum FT use the QFT algorithm block.

label: Statistics
info: Mean, median, std, t-test, chi-square, ANOVA, percentile, correlation, normalise.

label: Complex Ops
info: Complex arithmetic: add, mul, conjugate, magnitude, phase, polar↔rect.

label: Bitwise Operations
info: AND, OR, XOR, NOT, shifts. Used in Grover oracle construction.

label: Linspace
info: N evenly spaced values between a and b (like numpy.linspace).

label: Molecule
info: Initialise molecule from SMILES, PDB, or IUPAC name. Computes geometry, orbitals, basis set.

label: VQE Chemistry
info: VQE for molecular ground state. Jordan-Wigner mapping, UCCSD ansatz, frozen-core, parameter-shift gradients.

label: Hartree-Fock
info: Classical SCF. Starting point for all correlated methods. Computes molecular orbitals.

label: MP2 Correction
info: Møller-Plesset 2nd order: adds electron correlation to Hartree-Fock.

label: CCSD(T)
info: Coupled Cluster Singles Doubles + Triples — "gold standard" of quantum chemistry.

label: DFT
info: Density Functional Theory. B3LYP for organics, PBE for solids, wB97X-D for non-covalent.

label: Tanimoto Similarity
info: Molecular fingerprint similarity. Score=|A∩B|/|A∪B|. Industry standard for virtual screening.

label: Spectroscopy Sim
info: Simulate IR, Raman, UV-Vis, NMR spectra from optimised geometry.

label: pKa Calculator
info: Predict acid-base dissociation constant. Essential for drug solubility prediction.

label: LogP Calculator
info: Octanol/water partition coefficient. Lipinski Rule of 5: logP ≤ 5 for oral bioavailability.

label: Reaction Pathway
info: Minimum energy reaction path via NEB or IRC.

label: Molecular Docking
info: Score ligand-protein binding. AutoDock-Vina, Glide, GOLD, rDock engines.

label: ADMET Predictor
info: Absorption, Distribution, Metabolism, Excretion, Toxicity. Lipinski Rule of 5, BBB, hERG.

label: Virtual Screening
info: Screen compound library against target. Filter by Lipinski, PAINS, drug-likeness.

label: QSAR Model
info: Predict bioactivity from molecular structure using ML.

label: Lead Optimisation
info: Generate optimised candidates from scaffold using RL, generative models, or GA.

label: De Novo Design
info: Generate novel drug candidates from scratch using RFdiffusion or VAE generative models.

label: Toxicity Predictor
info: Ames mutagenicity, hERG, DILI, carcinogenicity, LD50, skin sensitisation.

label: Binding Free Energy
info: Protein-ligand ΔG via MM-GBSA, FEP, or PBSA.

label: Antigen Design
info: Design vaccine antigen from pathogen sequence. Methods: consensus, mosaic, ancestral, AI.

label: Epitope Predictor
info: Predict T-cell and B-cell epitopes. MHC I/II binding using NetMHCpan, IEDB.

label: Immunogenicity
info: Predict immunogenicity score — likelihood of triggering immune response.

label: Antibody Design
info: Design therapeutic antibodies: CDR graft, humanisation, affinity maturation.

label: mRNA Design
info: Optimise mRNA codon usage, UTR, poly-A tail for maximum expression and stability.

label: Vaccine Formulation
info: Predict optimal adjuvants, delivery systems, and storage conditions.

label: DNA Sequence
info: Load, parse, analyse DNA. GC content, melting temperature, k-mer counts.

label: Protein Folding
info: AlphaFold2/ColabFold structure prediction. pLDDT confidence score.

label: BLAST Search
info: NCBI BLAST: find homologous sequences in databases.

label: RNA Folding
info: Predict RNA secondary structure. Vienna RNAfold minimum free energy.

label: Gene Expression
info: Differential expression analysis from RNA-seq count matrices (DESeq2, edgeR, limma).

label: CRISPR Guide Design
info: Design sgRNA guides for CRISPR-Cas9. Predict on/off-target scores.

label: Sequence Alignment
info: Needleman-Wunsch (global), Smith-Waterman (local), MUSCLE/MAFFT (multiple).

label: Phylogenetics
info: Build phylogenetic tree from multiple aligned sequences.

label: Proteomics
info: Mass spec peptide identification and quantification.

label: DICOM Loader
info: Load DICOM medical images (CT, MRI, PET, X-ray).

label: Image Segmentation
info: Organ and lesion segmentation. TotalSegmentator, nnU-Net, or SAM.

label: Radiology AI
info: Classify pathologies: pneumonia, nodules, fractures, tumours.

label: EHR Loader
info: Load Electronic Health Records (FHIR, HL7, CSV, OMOP).

label: Hamiltonian
info: Define quantum Hamiltonian as Pauli string: Σᵢ hᵢ·Pᵢ. Used in VQE and QAOA.

label: Ising Model
info: Quantum Ising model: H = -J Σ ZᵢZᵢ₊₁ - h Σ Xᵢ. Phase transition at h/J=1.

label: Monte Carlo
info: Statistical sampling: Metropolis-Hastings for partition functions and observables.

label: Molecular Dynamics
info: Classical MD simulation with AMBER, GROMACS, or OpenMM force fields.

label: Quantum Field Theory
info: Lattice QFT simulation: scalar φ⁴ theory, lattice gauge theory.

label: Condensed Matter
info: Hubbard model, Heisenberg chain, topological phases, band structure.

label: Crystal Structure
info: Load or create crystalline structures from CIF files or space group + Wyckoff positions.

label: Band Structure
info: Electronic band structure from DFT. Identify direct/indirect gap, effective masses.

label: Phonon Calculation
info: Phonon dispersion and density of states from finite difference or DFPT.

label: Battery Material Sim
info: Li-ion insertion voltage profile, migration barriers, capacity.

label: Superconductor
info: BCS gap equation, Tc estimation, pair correlation from DFT+phonon coupling.

label: N-Body Simulation
info: Gravitational N-body simulation using leapfrog or Barnes-Hut tree algorithm.

label: Stellar Evolution
info: MESA-like stellar evolution tracks: main sequence, red giant, white dwarf.

label: Gravitational Waves
info: GW signal from CBC. LALSuite/PyCBC match filtering and parameter estimation.

label: Cosmology
info: ΛCDM power spectrum, correlation functions, CMB temperature anisotropies.

label: Exoplanet Transit
info: Simulate or fit transit light curves for exoplanet detection.

label: Train Model
info: Train classical ML: RF, GBT, SVM, logistic regression, k-NN, XGBoost.

label: Neural Network
info: Deep learning with configurable layers. PyTorch/JAX backend.

label: Predict
info: Apply trained model to new data.

label: Clustering
info: K-means, DBSCAN, hierarchical, Gaussian mixture models.

label: Dimensionality Reduction
info: PCA, t-SNE, UMAP, autoencoder for visualisation and feature compression.

label: Feature Engineering
info: Normalise, one-hot encode, impute missing values, polynomial features.

label: Model Evaluation
info: Accuracy, precision, recall, F1, ROC-AUC, RMSE, confusion matrix.

label: OpenAI
info: GPT-4o, GPT-4 turbo, o1, o3. Tool calling, streaming, vision, JSON mode.

label: Anthropic Claude
info: Claude Sonnet/Opus/Haiku. Extended thinking, vision, tool use.

label: Google Gemini
info: Gemini 2.5 Flash/Pro. Multimodal: text, image, video, audio, code.

label: Ollama (Local)
info: Local inference. No API key. Llama3, Mistral, CodeLlama, Phi, Gemma, DeepSeek.

label: MCP Server
info: Model Context Protocol connector. Exposes tools from any MCP-compatible service to LLMs.

label: MCP Tool Call
info: Invoke a specific tool exposed by an MCP server.

label: LLM Router
info: Auto-selects cheapest/fastest provider matching quality requirements. Falls back on error.

label: Embeddings
info: Dense vector embeddings: OpenAI text-embedding-3, Cohere, local sentence-transformers.

label: RAG Pipeline
info: Retrieval-Augmented Generation: embed docs, vector search, augmented LLM call.

label: LLM Agent
info: Autonomous ReAct / tool-use agent. Loops: reason → act → observe until done.

label: CSV Reader
info: Read CSV/TSV. Auto-detect types, handle missing values.

label: JSON Reader
info: Read JSON / JSONL files.

label: XML Reader
info: Read XML files and flatten repeated elements into a table.

label: Parquet Reader
info: Read columnar Parquet files. Efficient for large datasets.

label: Excel Reader
info: Read .xlsx / .xls files.

label: HDF5 Reader
info: Read HDF5 data files. Used by MD outputs, DICOM, NumPy.

label: PDB Reader
info: Load Protein Data Bank structure files.

label: File Watcher
info: Watch file/directory for changes and trigger downstream on new data.

label: DB Connect
info: Connect to PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB, Redis, DynamoDB, Snowflake, BigQuery.

label: SQL Query
info: Execute SQL on PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, SQL Server.

label: NoSQL Query
info: MongoDB find/aggregate, Redis get/set, DynamoDB scan/query.

label: Vector DB
info: Upsert and query embeddings in ChromaDB, Pinecone, Qdrant, Weaviate.

label: DB Write
info: INSERT / UPDATE / UPSERT rows.

label: AWS S3
info: Read, write, list AWS S3 objects. Streaming for large files.

label: Google Cloud Storage
info: Read, write GCS objects.

label: Azure Blob Storage
info: Read, write Azure Blob Storage.

label: HDFS
info: Hadoop Distributed File System read/write for big data workflows.

label: HTTP GET
info: HTTP GET with headers, query params, timeout, retry.

label: HTTP POST
info: HTTP POST with JSON or form body.

label: GraphQL
info: Execute GraphQL queries and mutations.

label: Webhook Sender
info: POST to webhook URL (Slack, Discord, Teams, custom).

label: Apache Kafka
info: Produce and consume Kafka messages.

label: Email (SMTP)
info: Send email via SMTP. Supports HTML body, attachments.

label: Filter
info: Filter rows or elements matching a condition.

label: Map / Apply
info: Apply function to each element.

label: Sort
info: Sort by key ascending or descending.

label: Group By
info: Group items by key, aggregate per group.

label: Join / Merge
info: Join two datasets on a common key. Inner, left, right, outer joins.

label: Pivot Table
info: Reshape data from long to wide format.

label: Schema Validation
info: Validate data against JSON Schema or Pydantic model.

label: Plot / Chart
info: Plotly, Matplotlib, Bokeh: line, bar, scatter, histogram, heatmap, 3D.

label: Print
info: Print value to logs panel.

label: Save File
info: Save variable to CSV, JSON, Parquet, HDF5, or pickle.

label: Table View
info: Display tabular data in the output panel with sorting, filtering, pagination.

label: Circuit Diagram
info: Export quantum circuit diagram as SVG, PDF, ASCII, or QASM.

label: VQE Dashboard
info: Live convergence plot: energy vs iteration, gradient norm, parameter trajectories.

label: Parallel Execute
info: Execute blocks in parallel using worker threads or async.

label: Rate Limiter
info: Throttle API calls. Sliding window or token bucket.

label: Retry
info: Retry on failure with exponential backoff.

label: Checkpoint
info: Save execution state so runs can be resumed after interruption.

label: Scheduler
info: Trigger execution on cron schedule or interval.

label: Logger
info: Structured logging with levels and JSON output.

label: Metric
info: Record numeric metric: gauge, counter, histogram. Prometheus, DataDog, CloudWatch.

label: Profiler
info: Time the enclosed block. Report to logs panel.

label: Assert
info: Assert a condition. Throws descriptive error on failure.

label: JWT
info: Sign and verify JSON Web Tokens (RS256, HS256, ES256).

label: Encrypt / Decrypt
info: Symmetric encryption: AES-256-GCM, ChaCha20-Poly1305.

label: OAuth2
info: OAuth2 client credentials and auth code flows.

label: API Key Auth
info: Validate incoming API key against stored hash.

label: OpenQASM Export
info: Export circuit to OpenQASM 2.0 or 3.0 for IBM Quantum / Qiskit.

label: Cirq Export
info: Export to Google Cirq circuit for Sycamore processor.

label: IBM Runtime Submit
info: Submit circuit to IBM Quantum via Qiskit Runtime primitives.

label: AWS Braket Submit
info: Submit to AWS Braket: IonQ, Rigetti, OQC, IQM, or local simulator.

label: Quil Export
info: Export to Quil format for Rigetti quantum processors.

label: Timer
info: Start and read elapsed time. Returns milliseconds.

label: UUID Generator
info: Generate UUID v4 or quantum-random ID.

label: Sleep / Wait
info: Pause execution for specified duration.

label: Config Loader
info: Load configuration from YAML, TOML, JSON, .env.

label: Note / Comment
info: Documentation block. Generates a comment in .sq export. Never executed.

label: Type Cast
info: Cast variable to int, float, str, bool, list, dict.

label: Debug Breakpoint
info: Pause execution and dump state for inspection.

label: Sanskrit Version
info: Emit Sanskrit engine version, shard config, and feature flags.

label: Steane [[7,1,3]]
info: 7-qubit Steane code: encodes 1 logical qubit, corrects any single-qubit error. CSS construction from classical Hamming codes.

label: Shor [[9,1,3]]
info: 9-qubit Shor code: first quantum error correcting code. Concatenates phase-flip and bit-flip codes.

label: Surface Code
info: Topological surface code: leading candidate for fault-tolerant QC. Threshold ~1%. Distance d requires d² physical qubits per logical qubit.

label: Color Code
info: 2D color code: supports transversal Clifford + T gates. Triangular lattice geometry.

label: Bit-Flip Code [[3,1,1]]
info: Simplest repetition code: protects against single bit-flip errors only.

label: Syndrome Measurement
info: Measure error syndrome without disturbing logical qubit. Uses ancilla qubits.

label: Error Correction
info: Apply correction operations based on measured syndrome.

label: Logical Gate
info: Apply gate to logical qubit (fault-tolerant). Clifford gates are transversal; T needs magic state distillation.

label: Magic State Distillation
info: Distil high-fidelity |T⟩ magic states needed for fault-tolerant T gates.

label: FT State Prep
info: Fault-tolerant preparation of |0⟩, |+⟩, or |T⟩ logical states.

label: QEC Threshold Sim
info: Simulate logical error rate vs physical error rate. Find code threshold.

label: MWPM Decoder
info: Minimum Weight Perfect Matching decoder for surface codes. O(n³) but highly optimised.

label: Stabilizer Simulator
info: Clifford-only simulation via stabilizer tableaux. Efficient O(n²) for error analysis.

label: Resource Estimator
info: Estimate physical qubit count, T-gate count, and runtime for fault-tolerant algorithm.

label: Concatenated Code
info: Concatenate inner and outer codes for multiplicative threshold improvement.

label: COBYLA
info: Constrained Optimisation By Linear Approximations. Derivative-free, robust for noisy VQE landscapes.

label: SPSA
info: Simultaneous Perturbation Stochastic Approximation. Scales to high-dimension VQE with only 2 cost evaluations per step.

label: Adam Optimizer
info: Adaptive Moment Estimation: Adam for quantum circuit parameter training.

label: Genetic Algorithm
info: Evolutionary optimisation: selection, crossover, mutation. For combinatorial and discrete problems.

label: Simulated Annealing
info: Probabilistic metaheuristic: accepts worse solutions with cooling probability. Avoids local minima.

label: Particle Swarm
info: Particle Swarm Optimisation: swarm intelligence for continuous parameter spaces.

label: L-BFGS-B
info: Limited-memory BFGS with box constraints. Best for smooth, differentiable landscapes.

label: Bayesian Optimisation
info: Sample-efficient optimisation using Gaussian Process surrogate model. Ideal for expensive objectives.

label: Max-Cut
info: Max-Cut problem: partition graph vertices to maximise cut edges. QAOA benchmark problem.

label: Travelling Salesman
info: Travelling Salesman Problem on quantum hardware via QAOA or quantum annealing.

label: Portfolio Optimisation
info: Mean-variance portfolio optimisation (Markowitz). Binary or continuous allocation.

label: Linear Programming
info: Minimise cᵀx subject to Ax≤b, x≥0. Uses scipy.optimize.linprog.

label: Integer Programming
info: Mixed-integer linear programming with branch-and-bound.

label: QUBO Formulation
info: Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimisation: x᷊Qx form for quantum annealers and QAOA.

label: Convex Optimisation
info: Solve convex programs via CVXPY (LP, QP, SOCP, SDP).

label: Grid Search
info: Exhaustive hyperparameter grid search with optional cross-validation.

label: Nelder-Mead
info: Simplex method: robust derivative-free optimisation. Reliable for low-dimensional smooth landscapes.

label: Differential Evolution
info: Population-based global optimiser. Excellent for multimodal continuous functions.

label: Tokenizer
info: Split text into tokens: BPE, WordPiece, SentencePiece, or whitespace.

label: Sentiment Analysis
info: Classify text sentiment: positive/negative/neutral with confidence score.

label: Named Entity Recognition

info: Discover latent topics: LDA, NMF, BERTopic.

label: Image Loader
info: Load image from file, URL, or numpy array. Returns tensor.

label: Image Preprocess
info: Normalise, resize, crop, augment for deep learning pipelines.

label: Object Detection
info: Detect and localise objects: YOLO, DETR, Faster-RCNN, SAM.

label: Image Classification
info: Classify image: ResNet, EfficientNet, ViT, CLIP zero-shot.

info: Generative AI: Stable Diffusion, DALL-E, Midjourney-compatible APIs.

label: Video Processing
info: Read, process, and write video frames. Apply CV pipeline per frame.

info: Upscale image 2×/4×/8× using Real-ESRGAN, SRCNN, SwinIR.

label: Image Captioning
info: Generate natural language description of an image.

info: Price European/Asian options via Quantum Amplitude Estimation. Quadratic speedup over Monte Carlo.

label: Risk Analysis
info: Value-at-Risk and Conditional VaR via Quantum Amplitude Estimation.

info: Mean-variance portfolio optimisation using QAOA or quantum annealing on QUBO formulation.

info: Bootstrap and interpolate yield curve from market instruments.

info: Merton model, KMV, or CDS spread-based credit risk estimation.

info: Backtest trading strategy on historical data. Compute Sharpe, max drawdown, win rate.

info: Fama-French 3/5-factor, CAPM, Barra risk factor decomposition.

info: Limit order book simulation with market microstructure.

info: DeFi, on-chain analytics, AMM pricing, MEV detection.

info: Statistical arbitrage: cointegration test, z-score signals, mean-reversion.

info: NLP for earnings call transcripts, news, SEC filings.

info: Optimal mix of solar, wind, storage for a grid region.

info: ML fire risk and spread prediction from satellite + weather data.

label: Life Cycle Assessment
info: ISO 14040/44 LCA for products, processes, and systems.

label: PID Controller
info: Proportional-Integral-Derivative controller for process control.

label: Kalman Filter
info: Optimal state estimation for linear systems with Gaussian noise.

label: Extended Kalman Filter
info: Non-linear state estimation via Jacobian linearisation.

label: Path Planning
info: A*, RRT*, D*, or DWA path planning in 2D/3D environments.

label: SLAM
info: Simultaneous Localisation And Mapping: ORB-SLAM3, GMapping, Cartographer.

label: RL Agent
info: Reinforcement learning: PPO, SAC, TD3, DQN for robot control.

label: Robot Kinematics
info: Forward and inverse kinematics for robotic arms (DH parameters).

label: Motion Control
info: Trajectory tracking, impedance control, force-torque control.

label: Sensor Fusion
info: Fuse IMU, GPS, camera, LiDAR, encoder data.

label: Grasp Planning
info: Compute stable grasp poses for robotic manipulation.

label: Physics Simulator
info: Real-time physics simulation: MuJoCo, Bullet, Isaac Gym.

label: Navigation Stack
info: Full navigation stack: global + local planner, costmap, recovery behaviours.

label: Givens Rotation
info: 2-qubit Givens rotation for Gaussian boson sampling and quantum chemistry ansätze.

label: √X†  (SX†)
info: Inverse √X gate. Native IBM gate. SX†² = X†.

label: RZX(θ)
info: ZX rotation: exp(-iθ/2 Z⊗X). IBM native 2-qubit gate for cross-resonance.

label: RXX(θ)
info: XX Ising coupling: exp(-iθ/2 X⊗X). Used in trapped-ion Mølmer-Sørensen gates.

label: RYY(θ)
info: YY Ising coupling: exp(-iθ/2 Y⊗Y).

label: √iSWAP
info: Square root of iSWAP: Google Sycamore native gate.

label: DCX
info: Double-CX (controlled-X in both directions sequentially). IBM hardware basis gate.

label: XXminusYY
info: (XX-YY)/2 rotation: IBM native gate for fermionic simulation.

label: XXplusYY
info: (XX+YY)/2 rotation: IBM native gate.

label: CSdg
info: Controlled-S-dagger gate.

label: CT
info: Controlled-T gate.

label: C3X (3-control CX)
info: Triple-controlled X gate. 4-qubit Toffoli generalisation.

label: C4X
info: 4-control CX gate.

label: CSX
info: Controlled-SX gate. IBM native decomposition gate.

label: U1(λ) — Phase
info: U1 gate: diagonal phase gate, equivalent to P gate. Qiskit legacy.

label: U2(φ,λ)
info: U2 gate: U3(π/2, φ, λ). Single Euler angle parametrisation.

label: Global Phase
info: Apply global phase e^(iθ) to entire state. Unobservable but matters for controlled operations.

label: Pauli Evolution
info: exp(-iθ P) for Pauli string P. Core VQE gate: time evolution under Hamiltonian term.

label: Trotter Step
info: First or second-order Trotter-Suzuki step: e^(-iHt) ≈ ∏e^(-iHⱼt).

label: Variational Form
info: Complete parameterised ansatz: EfficientSU2, RealAmplitudes, TwoLocal, UCCSD.

label: VQD
info: Variational Quantum Deflation: compute excited state energies by orthogonality constraint.

label: QITE
info: Quantum Imaginary Time Evolution: e^(-βH)|ψ⟩ for state preparation.

label: qDRIFT
info: Randomised first-order Hamiltonian simulation. Fewer gates than Trotterisation.

label: Hamiltonian Simulation
info: Simulate quantum system time evolution: Trotter, LCU, qubitisation, QSVT.

label: QSVT
info: Quantum Singular Value Transformation: unified framework for quantum algorithms.

label: Quantum Walk Search
info: Quantum walk-based search for marked vertices. √N speedup over classical random walk.

label: Quantum Counting
info: Count marked elements in database. Uses QPE + Grover oracle.

label: Quantum Arithmetic
info: Quantum adder, multiplier, comparator for arithmetic circuits.

label: Quantum LDPC
info: Quantum LDPC codes: good codes with constant rate and distance. Next-gen fault tolerance.

label: QRAM
info: Quantum Random Access Memory: superposition memory access. Bucket-brigade or fanout architecture.

label: Quantum Gibbs State
info: Prepare Gibbs thermal state ρ∝e^(-βH) using variational or QITE methods.

label: Quantum Linear System
info: VQLS: Variational Quantum Linear Solver for Ax=b without full HHL overhead.

label: Quantum GAN
info: Quantum Generative Adversarial Network for quantum state generation.

label: Classical Shadows
info: Efficient property estimation via classical shadows: O(log M) snapshots for M observables.

label: Quantum Bootstrap
info: Statistical bootstrapping for quantum measurement uncertainties.

label: Quantum Kernel
info: Compute quantum kernel matrix K(xᵢ,xⱼ)=|⟨φ(xᵢ)|φ(xⱼ)⟩|² for ML.

label: Many-Body Localisation
info: Simulate many-body localisation phase transition in disordered spin chains.

label: VQLS
info: Variational Quantum Linear Solver: hybrid approach for linear systems without QRAM.

label: Weak Measurement
info: Partial collapse measurement: extracts partial information without full collapse.

label: POVM
info: Positive Operator-Valued Measure: generalised quantum measurement.

label: Mid-Circuit Measure
info: Measure qubit mid-circuit and continue computation (dynamic circuits).

label: Deferred Measurement
info: Apply measurement deferral principle: move measurements to end of circuit.

label: Parity Check
info: Measure multi-qubit parity P = Z⊗Z⊗...⊗Z without collapsing individual qubits.

label: Bell Measurement
info: Project two qubits onto Bell basis. Used in teleportation and MBQC.

label: Density Matrix
info: Compute full density matrix ρ = |ψ⟩⟨ψ|. Exponential cost — only feasible for ≤12 qubits.

label: Fidelity
info: Compute state fidelity F = |⟨ψ₁|ψ₂⟩|². Measures overlap between two quantum states.

label: Coherent Error
info: Systematic over/under-rotation error. Worst case for VQE accuracy — does NOT average out.

label: Leakage to |2⟩
info: Superconducting qubit leakage into non-computational |2⟩ state.

label: Reset Error
info: Imperfect qubit reset: P(|1⟩ after reset) = p_reset_err.

label: SPAM Errors
info: State Preparation And Measurement errors combined.

label: 2Q Gate Noise
info: Higher error rate for 2-qubit gates vs 1-qubit gates.

label: Device Noise Model
info: Load real device calibration data to build accurate noise model.

label: Excited State VQE
info: Compute excited states via Multistate Contracted VQE or equation-of-motion.

label: Active Space
info: Define CASSCF/CASCI active space for multireference calculations.

label: Vibrational Analysis
info: Normal mode analysis: frequencies, zero-point energy, thermochemistry.

label: Solvation Model
info: Implicit solvation: PCM, SMD, COSMO. Compute solvation free energy.

label: NBO Analysis
info: Natural Bond Orbital analysis: bond orders, charges, hyperconjugation.

label: TD-DFT Excited States
info: Time-dependent DFT for UV-Vis absorption spectra and excited states.

label: GFN-xTB Semiempirical
info: Fast semiempirical GFN2-xTB for geometry optimisation and MD of large molecules.

label: Conformer Generation
info: Generate 3D conformers: RDKit ETKDG, OpenBabel, OMEGA.

label: Fingerprint Screening
info: Screen large compound libraries by fingerprint similarity to query.

label: Scaffold Decomposition
info: Bemis-Murcko scaffold decomposition for compound series analysis.

label: Retrosynthesis
info: AI-guided retrosynthetic route planning: ASKCOS, AiZynthFinder.

label: Pharmacophore Model
info: 3D pharmacophore fitting and virtual screening.

label: Matched Molecular Pairs
info: Matched Molecular Pair analysis for SAR and property prediction.

label: Solubility Predictor
info: Predict aqueous solubility (logS). Delaney ESOL, AqSolDB model.

label: scRNA-seq Analysis
info: Single-cell RNA sequencing: clustering, UMAP, marker genes.

label: Drug-Target Interaction
info: Predict drug-target binding affinity using graph neural networks.

label: SNP Analysis
info: Single Nucleotide Polymorphism calling and GWAS analysis.

label: Metabolomics
info: Identify and quantify metabolites from LC-MS/GC-MS data.

label: Epigenomics
info: ChIP-seq, ATAC-seq, bisulfite methylation analysis.

label: Biological Network
info: Protein-protein interaction network analysis: hub genes, community detection.

label: Metagenomics
info: Taxonomic and functional profiling of microbiome samples.

label: Flow Cytometry
info: Automated cell gating and population analysis from FACS data.

label: Cryo-EM
info: Cryo-EM structure determination: CTF correction, 2D/3D classification, refinement.

label: Gene Ontology Enrichment
info: GO/KEGG/Reactome pathway enrichment analysis.

label: Haplotype Phasing
info: Statistical and physical haplotype phasing from sequencing data.

label: Structural Variation
info: Detect SVs from WGS: deletions, duplications, inversions, translocations.

label: Protein Design
info: De novo protein design: ProteinMPNN, RFdiffusion, ESMFold.

label: Genome Assembly
info: De novo genome assembly from short or long reads.

label: Transformers (HuggingFace)
info: Load and run any HuggingFace model: text, vision, audio, multimodal.

label: AutoML
info: Automated ML: Auto-sklearn, TPOT, AutoGluon, H2O AutoML.

label: XGBoost
info: Gradient boosted trees: XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost.

label: Time Series Forecast
info: ARIMA, Prophet, LSTM, N-BEATS, TFT for time series forecasting.

label: Anomaly Detection (ML)
info: Unsupervised anomaly detection: Isolation Forest, OCSVM, Autoencoder, LOF.

label: Graph Neural Network
info: Graph learning: GCN, GAT, GraphSAGE, GIN for molecules, social networks, KGs.

label: Contrastive Learning
info: Self-supervised representation learning: SimCLR, MoCo, BYOL, DINO.

label: Meta-Learning
info: Few-shot learning: MAML, Prototypical Networks, Matching Networks.

label: Knowledge Distillation
info: Compress large teacher model into smaller student model.

label: Federated Learning
info: Privacy-preserving distributed ML: FedAvg, FedProx, SCAFFOLD.

label: Diffusion Model
info: Score-based diffusion model: DDPM, DDIM, score matching for generative modelling.

label: Causal Inference
info: Estimate causal effects: DoWhy, propensity score, IV, DID.

label: Survival Analysis
info: Time-to-event analysis: Kaplan-Meier, Cox PH, DeepHit.

label: SHAP Explainability
info: Model-agnostic SHAP feature importance: TreeSHAP, KernelSHAP, DeepSHAP.

label: Gaussian Process
info: Non-parametric Bayesian regression with uncertainty quantification.

label: Transfer Learning
info: Fine-tune pretrained model on new task.

label: Physics-Informed NN
info: Neural network constrained by physical PDEs (PINN).

label: Normalizing Flow
info: Exact density estimation: RealNVP, Glow, Neural Spline Flow.

label: Active Learning
info: Iterative labelling with uncertainty sampling, query-by-committee, or BADGE.

label: Model Compression
info: Pruning, quantisation, and mixed-precision for efficient deployment.

label: CFD Simulation
info: Computational fluid dynamics: Navier-Stokes, LBM, SPH.

label: Finite Element Analysis
info: Structural mechanics, heat transfer, electromagnetics via FEM.

label: EM Field Simulation
info: Maxwell equations: FDTD, FEM, MoM for antenna, waveguide, photonics.

label: Plasma Simulation
info: Particle-in-cell or fluid plasma simulation for fusion and astrophysics.

label: Nuclear Reactions
info: Nuclear cross-section, decay chains, fission/fusion Q-values.

label: Optics & Photonics
info: Ray tracing, wavefront analysis, photonic crystal bands.

label: Quantum Optics
info: Jaynes-Cummings, cavity QED, master equation for open quantum systems.

label: Tensor Network
info: MPS, DMRG, TEBD, PEPS for quantum many-body systems.

label: Spin-Boson Model
info: Open quantum system: two-level system coupled to bosonic bath.

label: QED Calculation
info: Quantum Electrodynamics: Feynman diagram evaluation, S-matrix elements.

label: Topological Phase
info: Compute topological invariants: Chern number, Z2 index, winding number.

label: Quantum Transport
info: Non-equilibrium Green function (NEGF) for quantum device transport.

label: Semiclassical Approx
info: WKB approximation, stationary phase, periodic orbit theory.

label: DFT+U
info: DFT with Hubbard U correction for strongly correlated materials (Mott insulators, TM oxides).

label: Prompt Template
info: Jinja2-style prompt template with variable substitution.

label: Chain of Thought
info: Few-shot chain-of-thought prompting for complex reasoning.

label: LLM Tool Use
info: Structured function calling / tool use for Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini.

label: Structured Output
info: Force LLM to return valid JSON matching a schema (JSON mode / Instructor).

label: Vector Store
info: Build and query semantic vector store for documents.

label: Semantic Search
info: Dense vector similarity search over embedded documents.

label: LLM Judge
info: Use LLM to evaluate quality, accuracy, or toxicity of generated text.

info: Persist and retrieve conversation history for multi-turn LLM interactions.

label: LLM Guardrails
info: Input/output validation: content moderation, PII detection, topic filtering.

info: Fine-tune LLMs: LoRA, QLoRA, full fine-tuning via OpenAI or HuggingFace.

info: Vision+language: analyse images, PDFs, audio with GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini.

label: Symbolic Math (SymPy)
info: Computer algebra: simplify, differentiate, integrate, solve, series expand.

label: ODE Solver
info: Solve ODEs: scipy solve_ivp — RK45, DOP853, LSODA, Radau.

label: PDE Solver
info: Finite difference/element PDE solver: heat, wave, Schrödinger, Burgers.

label: Root Finding
info: Bisection, Newton-Raphson, Brent, secant method for f(x)=0.

label: Interpolation
info: 1D/2D interpolation: linear, cubic spline, RBF, kriging.

label: Numerical Integration
info: Quadrature: Gaussian, Simpson, adaptive, Monte Carlo integration.

label: Eigenvalue Solver
info: Dense or sparse eigenvalue/eigenvector decomposition.

label: Random Number Generator
info: Pseudo-random and quasi-random sequences: uniform, normal, Sobol, Halton.

label: Graph Theory
info: NetworkX graph algorithms: shortest path, MST, centrality, flow, colouring.

label: Information Theory
info: Shannon entropy, mutual information, KL divergence, Fisher information.

label: Interactive Dashboard
info: Build interactive Dash/Streamlit/Panel dashboard from data.

label: Bloch Sphere
info: Render single-qubit state on Bloch sphere.

label: Histogram Plot
info: Plot measurement histogram with configurable bins and normalisation.

label: Network Graph
info: Visualise graph structure with Pyvis, Gephi-export, or D3.

label: Heatmap
info: Heatmap / correlation matrix / confusion matrix visualisation.

label: Report Generator
info: Auto-generate PDF/HTML report from experiment results.

label: Animation
info: Animate state evolution, VQE convergence, or molecular dynamics.

label: Molecule Visualiser
info: 3D molecular visualisation with py3Dmol / NGLview / RDKit 2D depiction.

label: Console Log
info: Pretty-print complex objects (dict, list, quantum state) to logs panel.

label: LaTeX Output
info: Render mathematical expressions as LaTeX in output panel.

label: gRPC Client
info: Call gRPC services with protobuf message serialisation.

label: MQTT
info: IoT messaging: publish/subscribe to MQTT broker.

label: WebSocket Client
info: WebSocket client for real-time bidirectional communication.

label: S3 Streaming Upload
info: Stream-upload large files to S3 using multipart upload.

label: SFTP
info: Secure file transfer via SFTP.

label: Prometheus Push
info: Push metrics to Prometheus Pushgateway.

label: Slack Notification
info: Send formatted Slack message with blocks and attachments.

label: arXiv Fetch
info: Fetch paper metadata and abstracts from arXiv API.

label: PubMed Fetch
info: Fetch biomedical literature from NCBI PubMed.

label: Discord Webhook
info: Send notifications to Discord channel via webhook.

label: Rolling Window
info: Rolling/sliding window: mean, std, sum, min, max, correlation.

label: Resample
info: Upsample or downsample time series data.

label: Feature Encoding
info: Label encode, ordinal encode, target encode, leave-one-out encode.

label: Impute Missing
info: Handle missing values: mean/median/mode, KNN, MICE, iterative imputer.

label: Normalise / Scale
info: StandardScaler, MinMaxScaler, RobustScaler, Normalizer, PowerTransformer.

label: Explode / Flatten
info: Explode list column into rows, or flatten nested JSON.

label: Deduplication
info: Remove duplicate rows exactly or via fuzzy string matching.

label: Binning / Discretise
info: Discretise continuous variable into bins: equal-width, equal-frequency, custom.

label: Parallel Map
info: Apply function in parallel with multiprocessing pool.

label: Result Cache
info: Cache function results by input key. Redis, disk, or in-memory.

label: Progress Bar
info: Show tqdm-style progress bar for long loops.

label: Feature Store
info: Register and retrieve ML features from Feast, Tecton, or Hopsworks.

label: Experiment Tracker
info: Log experiments to MLflow, Weights&Biases, or Neptune.

label: Data Versioning
info: Version datasets and model artifacts with DVC, LakeFS, or Delta Lake.

label: Environment Detect
info: Detect runtime environment: local, cloud, HPC cluster, Docker.

label: Conditional Skip
info: Skip downstream blocks if condition is true (circuit breaker pattern).

label: Format Number
info: Format numbers for display: scientific, fixed, engineering, percentage.

label: Quantum Runtime Config
info: Configure the Sanskrit quantum runtime: max qubits, shard size, precision.

label: List Comprehension
info: Generate list inline: [f(x) for x in items if condition]

label: Dict Comprehension
info: Build dict inline: {k: v for k,v in items}

label: Unpack / Destructure
info: Unpack tuple or list into multiple variables.

label: Swap Variables
info: Swap two variable values in place.

label: Structured Logger
info: Emit structured JSON log with arbitrary key-value fields.

label: Audit Log
info: Immutable audit trail for regulatory compliance.

label: Performance Log
info: Log execution time, memory, and CPU for profiling.

label: Alert / Notification
info: Trigger alert when metric crosses threshold.
